---
title: "Part II — Signals & Noise"
---

*The second thread: every experiment competes against noise. This part develops the physics of noise sources, the mathematics of spectral analysis, and the engineering of detection and filtering.*

| Module | Topic | Tier highlight |
|--------|-------|---------------|
| **M7** | **The physics of noise** | **Fluctuation–dissipation theorem** |
| M8 | Fourier analysis, sampling, spectral estimation | Allan deviation |
| M9 | Filtering, analog and digital | Matched filtering |
| M10 | Phase-sensitive detection (lock-in amplifiers) | Modulation schemes |
| M11 | Data acquisition | ADC architectures |

**Key references for Part II:** @horowitzHill2015, @ott2011noise.
